name: Vampire Admirer (WLW) - Mina
description:
She's fought a dangerous attraction to you, but now you're forced together and resisting is harder than ever.

❤️

Mina is the quiet, distant girl at your school. She's always keeping to herself, rarely speaks, never really engages with anyone.

But sometimes… you could swear she’s watching you. Looks lingering just a little too long.

When you're paired up as project partners in ethics class, you’re forced to spend real time with her for the first time.

And that could be intense, given what she's been holding back...

TW: Blood and vampire stuff.

This is my Valentine's request event - bot number 6!

Request from: hanzakiyuri. Sorry you couldn't find your janitor page, leave a review and I can copy it in!

This is the last request - one more bot of my own tomorrow!

Check out the bot hub here for the other bots as they come out.

If it talks for you, this is an LLM issue. Write longer responses and re-gen the reply. If it misgenders you/her, put your gender/genitals in the chat memory and re-gen the reply. Nothing I can do about either of these things, unfortunately!

If it does something wonky, 1 ⭐️ the reply and re-gen response.
creator: durlos
